body: This PR aims our allocation monitoring, at the performance targets, so that we get finer granularity of allocations across more functions.
title: Aim allocation monitoring at perf targets

body:
# PULL REQUEST

## Purpose and Content
This PR enables conversion from NameList Dicts to TOML files as part of the larger parameter refactoring. It does not affect how NameList or TOML are used in the current model code.

## Benefits and Risks
In the future, this will be used to remove NameList usage and switch over to TOML, making for a more unified parameter file system. 

However, parsing a NameList Dict into a flat TOML file requires renaming some parameters, and I am not sure what kind of naming conventions to use. [ClimaParameters TOML docs](https://clima.github.io/CLIMAParameters.jl/dev/toml/) also state that there is only very limited support for different types, so this will need to be expanded.

At the moment there are no risks because this doesn't change how anything is run, but removing NameList later on might cause issues for some users. 

## Linked Issues
[ Refactor the TurbulenceConvection argument handling in ClimaAtmos #721 ](https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaAtmos.jl/issues/721)

## PR Checklist
- [x] This PR has a corresponding issue OR is linked to an SDI.
- [x] I have followed CliMA's codebase [contribution](https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/Contributing/) and [style](https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/DevDocs/CodeStyle/) guidelines OR N/A.
- [x] I have followed CliMA's [documentation policy](https://github.com/CliMA/policies/wiki/Documentation-Policy).
- [x] I have checked all issues and PRs and I certify that this PR does not duplicate an open PR.
- [x] I linted my code on my local machine prior to submission OR N/A.
- [x] Unit tests are included OR N/A.
- [x] Code used in an integration test OR N/A.
- [x] All tests ran successfully on my local machine OR N/A.
- [x] All classes, modules, and function contain docstrings OR N/A.
- [x] Documentation has been added/updated OR N/A.
title: Add basic NameList to TOML file conversion

body: Adds high resolution dry baroclinic wave in the longrun pipeline. Also corrects a typo in cli_options.jl
title: add high resolution dry baroclinic wave longrun

body: This PR adds hydrostatic balance tests in sphere and column configurations. We should make sure these tests work when updating numerics.
title: add sphere and column hydrostatic balance tests
